mapper.insert: insert into venue_booking (space_name, user_id, user_name, user_phone, reserve_date, start_time, end_time, reservation_purpose, reservation_status, reject_reason, approver_id, approve_time, create_time, update_time, remark) values (#{spaceName}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{reserveDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reservationPurpose}, #{status}, #{rejectReason}, #{approverId}, #{approveTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select reservation_id, space_name, user_id, user_name, user_phone, reserve_date, start_time, end_time, reservation_purpose, reservation_status, reject_reason, approver_id, approve_time, create_time, update_time, remark from venue_booking order by create_time desc

select reservation_id, space_name, user_id, user_name, user_phone, reserve_date, start_time, end_time, reservation_purpose, reservation_status, reject_reason, approver_id, approve_time, create_time, update_time, remark from venue_booking where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc

select reservation_id, space_name, user_id, user_name, user_phone, reserve_date, start_time, end_time, reservation_purpose, reservation_status, reject_reason, approver_id, approve_time, create_time, update_time, remark from venue_booking where reservation_id = #{id}
